message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.2.9 → 0.3.0 (crates.io v0.3.0)

- Cargo.toml: `asupersync = { version = "0.2.9", optional = true }`
  → `{ version = "0.3.0", optional = true }`. Used only when the
  `async-stream` feature is enabled (see line 94: `async-stream =
  ["dep:asupersync"]`).
- Cargo.lock: refreshed via `cargo update`.
